creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text: I'm trying to play bg2 (Baldur's Gate 2 with or without Throne of Bhaal and/or Trilogy mod). The problem is that I need to patch the cmake machinery to create an option to build GemRB without linking to OpenAL. Otherwise, if the dependency is just removed, the resulting package will be different depending on whether the user has OpenAL installed during build time or not.
